## Summary

Describe the requested feature.

## Use Case

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Scope

What should be included?

## Out of Scope

What should not be included?

## Ethical Considerations

Confirm the feature only uses public data and does not involve brute force, bypass, exploitation, or unauthorized access.
